DISCOVERY, 301, PLAINTIFF MAHER MEMARZADEH'S MOTION TO COMPEL REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, SET ONE. THE MOTION IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR AS UNTIMELY FILED AND SERVED. THE MOTION WAS FILED ON DECEMBER 11, 2025 AND SERVED BY REGULAR MAIL. A MOTION MUST BE FILED AND SERVED 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE IT IS SET FOR HEARING, EXTENDED BY FIVE CALENDAR DAYS WHERE IT IS SERVED BY REGULAR MAIL ON AN ADDRESS WITHIN CALIFORNIA. (CODE CIV. PROC., SEC. 1005, SUBD. (B).) THE 16TH COURT DAY AFTER DECEMBER 11, 2025, WAS JANUARY 6, 2026. THE MOTION WAS SET ONLY ONE CALENDAR DAY AFTER THE 16TH COURT DAY. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL SHALL UPDATE THEIR CONTACT INFORMATION IN THE COURT'S REGISTER OF ACTIONS IF WARRANTED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

Plaintiff Maher Memarzadeh?S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Requests For Admission, Set One; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Moving Party In Support Of Motion To Compel Requests For Admission, Set One, And Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MAHER MEMARZADEH'S Motion To Compel Requests For Admission, Set One.

The motion is ordered off calendar as untimely filed and served. The motion was filed on December 11, 2025 and served by regular mail. A motion must be filed and served 16 court days before it is set for hearing, extended by five calendar days where it is served by regular mail on an address within California. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 1005, subd. (b).) The 16th court day after December 11, 2025, was January 6, 2026. The motion was set only one calendar day after the 16th court day.

Defendant's counsel shall update their contact information in the court's register of actions if warranted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
